description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a predominantly white exterior. The property is surrounded by a low boundary wall and landscaped with numerous trees, providing a sense of privacy and greenery. The backyard includes a freeform swimming pool with adjacent lounge chairs, while the front area has a paved driveway and entry path. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The house appears to have two stories, with a flat roof and multiple outdoor terraces or balconies. The main entrance is set back from the street, accessible via a paved walkway flanked by trees and open garden beds.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped gardens, and a backyard pool. The property is enclosed by a low wall and features paved walkways and multiple trees.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, paved driveway, and two trees flanking the entry path, with the house facade and upper terrace visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the property, the flat roof, and the arrangement of trees along the boundary, as well as the pool and lounge area in the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view focuses on the backyard, showcasing the freeform swimming pool, lounge chairs, and dense tree landscaping, with the house's rear facade and balconies visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the house's side elevation, the pool area, and the continuation of the landscaped garden and trees along the property edge.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with a paved walkway, flanked by trees and open garden beds, no porch or columns, minimalist modern style.
